query:
SELECT id AS "id!: Uuid",
                      session_id AS "session_id!: Uuid",
                      position AS "position!: i64",
                      message,
                      executor_config,
                      queued_at AS "queued_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
               FROM session_queued_messages
               WHERE session_id = $1
               ORDER BY position ASC, queued_at ASC
